bead.title: document lock-lifetime contract in AGENTS.md
bead.description:
PROBLEM
The lock-lifetime contract introduced by [[scope-locks-to-mutation-window]], [[lock-lifetime-metric]], and [[lock-hold-time-cap]] must be discoverable by future contributors and agents so they do not regress it.

ROOT CAUSE
AGENTS.md (or the equivalent contributor guidance file at repo root) has no section describing acceptable lock-holding patterns or the configured caps. Executing agent should locate the contributor-facing doc — `ls AGENTS.md README.md docs/CONTRIBUTING.md` — and add the section there.

PROPOSED FIX
Add a 'Lock Lifetime Contract' section that states: (a) git index.lock and .ddx/.git-tracker.lock must never be held across an LLM subprocess; (b) default caps (10s index, 30s tracker) and the env vars that override them; (c) where lock-violation evidence is written (.ddx/executions/<run-id>/lock-violation.json); (d) link to the integration test that enforces this.

NON-SCOPE
- Code changes (handled by sibling children)
- Website documentation updates
- Cross-repo (HELIX, Dun) doc updates.
bead.acceptance:
1. AGENTS.md (or located equivalent) contains a 'Lock Lifetime Contract' section with the four bullet items listed in PROPOSED FIX.
2. TestDocs_LockContractSectionPresent (or a simple grep-based check in an existing docs test) asserts the section heading and key strings ('10s', '30s', 'lock-violation.json') are present.
3. cd cli && go test ./... green.
4. lefthook run pre-commit passes.
